{{Quote|Colonel Selid, this is Grand Admiral Thrawn. Report.|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Selid|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Kleyn Selid''' was an officer of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in command of [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] some [[9 ABY/Legends|five years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Biography==
Young for his rank, Selid was quite frustrated when [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] assigned him the task of temporary commander of the [[Mount Tantiss garrison]] stationed to protect [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] hidden storehouse. Selid wanted to command troops in the field rather than from behind his desk, something he came to call being a glorified "baby-sitter."<ref name="TLCS">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref>

In the final days of the [[Thrawn campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Grand Admiral came to view the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Joruus C'baoth]] as a bit of a problem and so was not displeased when the mad clone departed the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]] to "take command of his Empire" from Wayland. There, C'baoth forced [[General/Legends|General]] [[Freja Covell]], who was to take Selid's post as commanding officer, into a state of dependence which faltered under the effects of the [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamiri]] spread throughout the [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] facility, killing Covell. The morning after the general's arrival, Selid was alerted by an orderly telling him that Covell was dead. He immediately ordered a medical team to investigate, only to find that large portions of Covell's brain had inexplicably simply shut down. Without hesitation, Selid contacted the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] and reported the situation and the events of the previous day directly to Grand Admiral Thrawn, who in turn ordered Selid to put C'baoth under arrest and confinement, and to not allow Covell's personal company of troops to enter the facility. Though wary concerning the orders to lock-out the company of soldiers, he did what he was told. Despite this, he was pleased when Thrawn restored his role of [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]].
